_comment: Fix 2 + Fix 3 — correct answer path: verifies BEAT3 question is yes/no for age 4, and followup bridge is not Did-you-know

history.content: Oh, you found an apple! Apples are SO crunchy and sweet — I love how shiny they look! Do you like eating apples?
When you cut an apple right in half, there is something really cool hiding in the very middle. What do you think you would see in there?
